title: TEEROK TR11 Remote Control Cars for Kids, 1:16 20+Km/h High Speed Off Road RC Car, All Terrains 2WD RC Trucks Vehicle, with 2 Batteries 50+min Play Time for Adults Boys 8-12
features: 【20Km/h 1:16 RC Cars】1:16 scale with 280 motor so it can speed up tp 20 km/h. Its solid chassis and shell, and durable tires can easily drive the remote control car on the beach, beach, rock or concrete pavement. The rc car with flexible operating system, suitable for indoor and outdoor.

【50 min+ Play Time 】 Equipped with 2*7.4V/500mAh battery and a USB charger., you can enjoy about 50 minutes driving fun (25 minutes per battery), depending on the operation.The battery is charged via USB, which is fast and convenient.

【Independent Signal without Interference】The remote control operates in the 2.4GHz frequency band and has anti-interference effect. It can support multiple racing cars to compete at the same time. The longest control distance can reach 50 meters. Whether indoor or outdoor, it is an excellent cross-country monster truck.

【LED Headlight and Undercarriage Light】This remote control car comes with LED headlight and undercarriage light. You can clearly see them both in the day and at night. Especially at night, the design of long line lights makes the whole car look more interesting.

【After-sale Service and Perfect Gift】If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us. We will provide you with a satisfactory solution within 24 hours! This is a perfect gift for boys and girls aged 8, 9, 10, 11, 12 and above.
description: Product Description ✔Great moments and fun outdoors The perfect remote-controlled car toy, a must-have for boys, girls, adults and off-road fans! The professional transmitter for radio-controlled cars gives you a far better experience. ✔Professional service If you need help with this product or need spare parts, please contact our after-sales staff. Please read the instructions carefully and operate the RC car correctly to avoid operating errors or damage. Cool drifts Thanks to the flexible operating system, the RC car can drive forwards, backwards, left and right and, in conjunction with the remote steering and the high-quality rubber tyres, drift easily even at high speeds. Cool light Stylish and realistic LED headlights determine the position of the RC truck and indicate the direction of travel of the car toy when there is not enough light. Super wear-resistant tyres The tyres of the remote-controlled car are made of high-quality, wear-resistant thermoplastic rubber with a thread design. So it has better elasticity, wear resistance, heat resistance, chemical stability and grip, which enable the RC car to adapt and conquer various terrains. Robust front and rear bumpers The front and rear bumpers of RC car reduce damage to the vehicle from vibrations and shocks, prevent collisions and better protect the vehicle components from impacts, making driving with remote control car safer. 2.4GHz remote control system The car is equipped with a 2.4 GHz remote control, which is easy to operate and works flawlessly within a range of up to 50 metres. The control unit on the remote control has forward, reverse and brake functions as well as clockwise and anti-clockwise rotation. Directional trim system The steering of the RC is sensitive and precise, with a trim lever on the bottom that can be used to adjust the direction of the RC tyres for an excellent steering experience. Q: How can you adjust the direction if it doesn't go straight? A: There is a direction adjuster under the car, you can adjust the sensitivity of the direction by steering it. Package list： 1 x RC ca 1 x 2.4Ghz remote control 2 x car batteries (one for the car/one included in the package) 1 x USB charging cable 1 x screwdriver 1 x user manual Specification: A perfect gift for children and adults Size: 31.5 * 19.3 *12.0 cm (1/16) Max. Speed: 20 km / h Running time: 60 min (depending on play mode) Charging time: approx. 90 min. (per battery) Remote control distance: approx. 50m (no interference and obstacle) Vehicle battery: 7.4 V / 500 mAh Remote control battery: 4 x 1.5 V AA battery(Not Included) To maintain the stability of the battery, please remove it from the toy car. Otherwise, the battery life may be affected. Please switch the truck OFF when charging. Please control the Cars toy according to our instruction manual to avoid the injuries caused by the inappropriate control.
